lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੀ ਨਚਹਿ ਵਾਜੇ ਵਾਵਹਿ ਰੂਪ ਕਰਹਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: giaanee nacheh vaaje vaaveh roop kareh seegaar |
lines.english: The spiritually wise dance and play their musical instruments, adorning themselves with beautiful decorations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੀ ਰਯਤਿ ਗਿਆਨ ਵਿਹੂਣੀ ਭਾਹਿ ਭਰੇ ਮੁਰਦਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: andhee rayat giaan vihoonee bhaeh bhare muradaar |
lines.english: Their subjects are blind, and without wisdom, they try to please the will of the dead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚੇ ਕੂਕਹਿ ਵਾਦਾ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਜੋਧਾ ਕਾ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aooche kookeh vaadaa gaaveh jodhaa kaa veechaar |
lines.english: They shout out loud, and sing epic poems and heroic stories.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਰਖ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਹਿਕਮਤਿ ਹੁਜਤਿ ਸੰਜੈ ਕਰਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: moorakh panddit hikamat hujat sanjai kareh piaar |
lines.english: The fools call themselves spiritual scholars, and by their clever tricks, they love to gather wealth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤੀ ਸਦਾਵਹਿ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਛਡਿ ਬਹਹਿ ਘਰ ਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jatee sadaaveh jugat na jaaneh chhadd baheh ghar baar |
lines.english: They call themselves celibate, and abandon their homes, but they do not know the true way of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮੀ ਧਰਮੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਗਾਵਾਵਹਿ ਮੰਗਹਿ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dharamee dharam kareh gaavaaveh mangeh mokh duaar |
lines.english: The righteous waste their righteousness, by asking for the door of salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿ ਪਰਵਾਣਾ ਪਿਛੈ ਪਾਈਐ ਤਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੋਲਿਆ ਜਾਪੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: pat paravaanaa pichhai paaeeai taa naanak toliaa jaapai |2|
lines.english: If the weight of honor is placed on the scale, then, O Nanak, one sees his true weight. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਪੂਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਘਟਿ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਆਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko pooraa aape hovai ghatt na koee aakhai |
lines.english: Everyone calls himself perfect; none call themselves imperfect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਦੀ ਸੁ ਵਜਗਿ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਸਚਾ ਵੇਖੈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: vadee su vajag naanakaa sachaa vekhai soe |
lines.english: Evil actions become publicly known; O Nanak, the True Lord sees everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨੀ ਛਾਲਾ ਮਾਰੀਆ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanee chhaalaa maareea karataa kare su hoe |
lines.english: Everyone makes the attempt, but that alone happens which the Creator Lord does.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਜਾਤਿ ਨ ਜੋਰੁ ਹੈ ਅਗੈ ਜੀਉ ਨਵੇ ॥
lines.translit: agai jaat na jor hai agai jeeo nave |
lines.english: In the world hereafter, social status and power mean nothing; hereafter, the soul is new.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੀ ਲੇਖੈ ਪਤਿ ਪਵੈ ਚੰਗੇ ਸੇਈ ਕੇਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jin kee lekhai pat pavai change seee kee |3|
lines.english: Those few, whose honor is confirmed, are good. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਕਰਮੁ ਜਿਨਾ ਕਉ ਤੁਧੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਤਾ ਤਿਨੀ ਖਸਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhur karam jinaa kau tudh paaeaa taa tinee khasam dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: Only those whose karma You have pre-ordained from the very beginning, O Lord, meditate on You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਨਾ ਜੰਤਾ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੁਧੁ ਵੇਕੀ ਜਗਤੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: enaa jantaa kai vas kichh naahee tudh vekee jagat upaaeaa |
lines.english: Nothing is in the power of these beings; You created the various worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਨੋ ਤੂੰ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਇਕਿ ਆਪਹੁ ਤੁਧੁ ਖੁਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa no toon mel laihi ik aapahu tudh khuaaeaa |
lines.english: Some, You unite with Yourself, and some, You lead astray.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਜਿਥੈ ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪੁ ਬੁਝਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te jaaniaa jithai tudh aap bujhaaeaa |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace You are known; through Him, You reveal Yourself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: sahaje hee sach samaaeaa |11|
lines.english: We are easily absorbed in You. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਦਾਰੂ ਸੁਖੁ ਰੋਗੁ ਭਇਆ ਜਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਤਾਮਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: dukh daaroo sukh rog bheaa jaa sukh taam na hoee |
lines.english: Suffering is the medicine, and pleasure the disease, because where there is pleasure, there is no desire for God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਵਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: balihaaree kudarat vasiaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to Your almighty creative power which is pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰਣਾ ਮੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਜਾ ਹਉ ਕਰੀ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: toon karataa karanaa mai naahee jaa hau karee na hoee |1|
lines.english: You are the Creator Lord; I can do nothing. Even if I try, nothing happens. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਲਖਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: teraa ant na jaaee lakhiaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Your limits cannot be known. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਅਕਲ ਕਲਾ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaat meh jot jot meh jaataa akal kalaa bharapoor rahiaa |
lines.english: Your Light is in Your creatures, and Your creatures are in Your Light; Your almighty power is pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਤੇ ਕੀਆ ਬਾਤਾ ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਣਾ ਸੁ ਕਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak karate keea baataa jo kichh karanaa su kar rahiaa |2|
lines.english: Nanak speaks the stories of the Creator Lord; whatever He is to do, He does. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸੁਆਲੑਿਉ ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਤੀ ਸੋ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: toon sachaa saahib sifat suaalaiau jin keetee so paar peaa |
lines.english: You are the True Lord and Master; Your Praise is so beautiful. One who sings it, is carried across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗ ਸਬਦੰ ਗਿਆਨ ਸਬਦੰ ਬੇਦ ਸਬਦੰ ਬ੍ਰਾਹਮਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: jog sabadan giaan sabadan bed sabadan braahamanah |
lines.english: The Way of Yoga is the Way of spiritual wisdom; the Vedas are the Way of the Brahmins.

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸਬਦੰ ਏਕ ਸਬਦੰ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਭੇਉ ॥
lines.translit: sarab sabadan ek sabadan je ko jaanai bheo |
lines.english: The Way of all is the Way of the One; Nanak is a slave to one who knows this secret;

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਤ੍ਰੀ ਸਬਦੰ ਸੂਰ ਸਬਦੰ ਸੂਦ੍ਰ ਸਬਦੰ ਪਰਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਤਹ ॥
lines.translit: khatree sabadan soor sabadan soodr sabadan paraa kritah |
lines.english: The Way of the Khshatriya is the Way of bravery; the Way of the Shudras is service to others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਸੋਈ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਦੇਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak taa kaa daas hai soee niranjan deo |3|
lines.english: He himself is the Immaculate Divine Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਸਨੰ ਸਰਬ ਦੇਵਾ ਦੇਵ ਦੇਵਾ ਤ ਆਤਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: ek krisanan sarab devaa dev devaa ta aatamaa |
lines.english: The One Lord Krishna is the Divine Lord of all; He is the Divinity of the individual soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮਾ ਬਾਸੁਦੇਵਸੵਿ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਭੇਉ ॥
lines.translit: aatamaa baasudevasay je ko jaanai bheo |
lines.english: Nanak is a slave to anyone who understands this mystery of the all-pervading Lord;

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁੰਭੇ ਬਧਾ ਜਲੁ ਰਹੈ ਜਲ ਬਿਨੁ ਕੁੰਭੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kunbhe badhaa jal rahai jal bin kunbh na hoe |
lines.english: Water remains confined within the pitcher, but without water, the pitcher could not have been formed;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਸੋਈ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਦੇਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak taa kaa daas hai soee niranjan deo |4|
lines.english: He himself is the Immaculate Divine Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਿਆ ਹੋਵੈ ਗੁਨਹਗਾਰੁ ਤਾ ਓਮੀ ਸਾਧੁ ਨ ਮਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: parriaa hovai gunahagaar taa omee saadh na maareeai |
lines.english: If an educated person is a sinner, then the illiterate holy man is not to be punished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਕਾ ਬਧਾ ਮਨੁ ਰਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: giaan kaa badhaa man rahai gur bin giaan na hoe |5|
lines.english: just so, the mind is restrained by spiritual wisdom, but without the Guru, there is no spiritual wisdom. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੀ ਕਲਾ ਨ ਖੇਡੀਐ ਜਿਤੁ ਦਰਗਹ ਗਇਆ ਹਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: aisee kalaa na kheddeeai jit daragah geaa haareeai |
lines.english: So do not play such a game, which will bring you to ruin at the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਘਾਲੇ ਘਾਲਣਾ ਤੇਵੇਹੋ ਨਾਉ ਪਚਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jehaa ghaale ghaalanaa teveho naau pachaareeai |
lines.english: As are the deeds done, so is the reputation one acquires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਿਆ ਅਤੈ ਓਮੀਆ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ਅਗੈ ਵੀਚਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: parriaa atai omeea veechaar agai veechaareeai |
lines.english: The accounts of the educated and the illiterate shall be judged in the world hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਹਿ ਚਲੈ ਸੁ ਅਗੈ ਮਾਰੀਐ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: muhi chalai su agai maareeai |12|
lines.english: One who stubbornly follows his own mind shall suffer in the world hereafter. ||12||
